name: word-markdown-addin
description: Microsoft Word add-in to import and export Markdown (.md) documents.

scripts.start: npm run render-manifest && npm run dev-server
scripts.build: echo "No build step required for this static manifest sample."
scripts.build:online: npm run build:store && npm run build:site
scripts.single-machine: npm run setup:with-md-association && npm run sideload
